name: Instantly
what_it_does: Sales email outreach platform for cold email campaigns at scale, combining inbox rotation, AI-powered personalization, email warmup, and automated follow-up sequences to improve deliverability and reply rates.
use_cases: Running automated cold email sequences with multi-step follow-ups across multiple sending accounts
Warming up new email inboxes to establish sender reputation before outreach campaigns
Managing large prospect lists across hundreds of sending accounts to maximize deliverability
Tracking campaign performance (opens, replies, bounces) and triggering follow-up actions via webhook
Programmatically creating and managing outreach campaigns from a CRM or sales tool integration
not_for: Marketing newsletters or broadcast emails to opted-in subscriber lists (use Mailchimp or Loops)
Transactional email delivery (use Postmark or SendGrid)
Inbound lead nurturing where GDPR consent is required for all contacts
Teams that need a built-in CRM or deal pipeline — Instantly is outreach only
best_when: A sales or growth team needs to run high-volume cold email outreach with inbox rotation across many sending accounts to maximize deliverability and replies at scale.
avoid_when: You need verified GDPR opt-in email marketing, transactional email, or multi-channel outreach including phone and LinkedIn.

auth.notes: API key passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Single key per account with no scope granularity — full read/write access to all campaigns, leads, and account settings. API keys are generated in the Instantly dashboard.

pricing.notes: 14-day free trial available. Pricing is flat subscription — sending volume and deliverability features differ between tiers. Email warmup included on all plans. No per-email pricing.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Error responses are basic JSON with a message field but lack structured error codes. Validation errors often return generic 400 responses without identifying the specific failing field. No retry guidance in error bodies.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency key support. Creating a lead or campaign twice results in duplicates. Agents must implement their own deduplication logic before API calls.
known_agent_gotchas: Email accounts must be connected and warmed up before campaigns can use them — agents cannot create campaigns on brand-new accounts without warmup period
Lead deduplication is not enforced via API — adding the same email twice creates duplicate leads in a campaign
Campaign scheduling uses account timezone — agents must be aware of timezone config or emails send at unexpected times
Unsubscribe and bounce handling updates account-level suppression lists — agents reading lead status must check these separately
API v2 (current) has different endpoints than older v1 documentation still indexed online — use only official v2 docs
Webhook delivery is not guaranteed — no retry mechanism documented for failed webhook deliveries
Rate limits are not clearly documented and appear to be enforced inconsistently across endpoints

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced on all API endpoints. Single API key with no scoping is the primary security concern — one leaked key exposes all campaigns, leads, and account data. No key rotation tooling. GDPR compliance is user's responsibility — Instantly provides data processing addendum on request. CAN-SPAM compliance features (unsubscribe links) built into email templates.
